originalTitle: US stocks end higher; chip surge offsets Iran worries
summary: STORY: U.S. stocks closed higher on Thursday, with the Dow adding more than a quarter of a percent, the S&P 500 climbing more than eight-tenths of a percent and the tech-heavy Nasdaq gaining 1.3% :: Micron Technology Chip stocks rallied, sparked by a 4.5% jump in shares of Micron Technology. The memory chip maker laid out plans to invest more than $250 billion in domestic chip manufacturing through 2035 to boost supply amid the AI boom. Micron's peers also joined the rally, with Applied Materials climbing more than 3% and SanDisk surging over 7.5%. AI-related stocks have been volatile lately as investors worried about the sustainability of a rally that has helped Wall Street reach record levels in 2026. Gina Martin Adams is chief market strategist at HB Wealth. "Tech has obviously been in the limelight of equity markets for a while, but that worked against stocks in the month of June. We'll see if the month of July brings something different. Obviously, the sector is dealing with a lot of issues, including the upcoming earnings season, where expectations are pretty high, as well as a tremendous amount of new shares coming to the market. First with SpaceX and now with SK Hynix out of South Korea." Shares of Meta Platforms rose more than 4.5% after Reuters reported that the company plans to manufacture AI chips starting in September. :: PepsiCo Elsewhere in the market, shares of PepsiCo fell more than 3% despite the company beating second-quarter revenue estimates. PepsiCo warned of higher commodity costs in the second half of the year at a time when the snack and beverage giant is increasing investments and lowering prices to attract value-conscious consumers. And shares of Costco sank more than 4% to a six-month low after the retailer reported decelerating comparable sales for June.

The memory chip maker laid out plans to invest more than $250 billion in domestic chip manufacturing through 2035 to boost supply amid the AI boom. Micron's peers also joined the rally, with Applied Materials climbing more than 3% and SanDisk surging over 7.5%. AI-related stocks have been volatile lately as investors worried about the sustainability of a rally that has helped Wall Street reach record levels in 2026. Gina Martin Adams is chief market strategist at HB Wealth. "Tech has obviously been in the limelight of equity markets for a while, but that worked against stocks in the month of June. We'll see if the month of July brings something different. Obviously, the sector is dealing with a lot of issues, including the upcoming earnings season, where expectations are pretty high, as well as a tremendous amount of new shares coming to the market. First with SpaceX and now with SK Hynix out of South Korea." Shares of Meta Platforms rose more than 4.5% after Reuters reported that the company plans to manufacture AI chips starting in September. :: PepsiCo Elsewhere in the market, shares of PepsiCo fell more than 3% despite the company beating second-quarter revenue estimates. PepsiCo warned of higher commodity costs in the second half of the year at a time when the snack and beverage giant is increasing investments and lowering prices to attract value-conscious consumers. And shares of Costco sank more than 4% to a six-month low after the retailer reported decelerating comparable sales for June.
chineseTitle: 美股收高；芯片激增抵消了伊朗的担忧
chineseSummary: 故事：美国股市周四收高，道指上涨超过 25%，标准普尔 500 指数上涨十分之八以上，以科技股为主的纳斯达克指数上涨 1.3% :: 美光科技 (Micron Technology) 股价上涨 4.5%，带动芯片股上涨。这家存储芯片制造商计划到 2035 年在国内芯片制造领域投资超过 2500 亿美元，以在人工智能热潮中增加供应。美光科技的同行也加入了涨势，应用材料公司股价上涨超过 3%，SanDisk 股价飙升超过 7.5%。人工智能相关股票最近一直波动，投资者担心股市在 2026 年创下历史新高的反弹能否持续。吉娜·马丁·亚当斯 (Gina Martin Adams) 是 HB Wealth 的首席市场策略师。 “一段时间以来，科技股显然一直是股市的焦点，但这对 6 月份的股市不利。我们将看看 7 月份是否会带来不同的情况。显然，该行业正在处理很多问题，包括即将到来的财报季，预期相当高，以及大量新股进入市场。首先是 SpaceX，现在是韩国的 SK 海力士。”路透社报道称，Meta Platforms 计划从 9 月份开始生产人工智能芯片，该公司股价上涨超过 4.5%。 :: 百事可乐 在市场的其他地方，尽管该公司第二季度的收入超出了预期，但该公司的股价仍下跌了 3% 以上。百事可乐警告称，在这家零食和饮料巨头加大投资并降低价格以吸引注重价值的消费者之际，下半年商品成本将上升。 Costco 报告可比销售额下降后，该公司股价下跌 4% 以上，跌至六个月低点。

whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
